title: NOAA Fisheries Open Science Code of Conduct
text: Examples behavior contributes creating positive environment include: Using welcoming inclusive language respectful differing viewpoints experiences Gracefully accepting constructive criticism Focusing best community Showing empathy towards community members Examples unacceptable behavior participants include: use sexualized language imagery unwelcome sexual attention advances Trolling, insulting/derogatory comments, personal political attacks Public private harassment Publishing others’ private information, physical electronic address, without explicit permission conduct reasonably considered inappropriate professional setting

title: Contributing Guidelines
text: Throughout project, use standard types communicate effectively. types used labeling issues, creating branches, committing changes naming pull requests. Please reference use types contributing project: fix: Patch unexpected undesirable behavior build: Add modify build-related components (e.g. workflows, versioning, etc.) chore: Maintenance product repository (e.g. gitignore, templates, etc.) docs: Add modify documentation feature: Add modify feature functionality refactor: Rewrite restructure code without altering behavior style: Reformat code style without altering behavior test: Add modify tests issues, branches, commits pull requests align one types. questions need assistance, please reach maintainer.

title: Contributing Guidelines

title: Contributing Guidelines
text: Please write conventional commit message: Use type(optional scope): commit message structure (see acceptable types) Separate changes commits unique messages Write using imperative mood (example: “fix: correct food web”) Include scope commit serves larger purpose (example: “refactor(food web fix): reorder data ingestion”) brief possible without losing clarity

what: Calculate Productivity Anomalies from Survey Data — create_productivity_anomaly
title: Calculate Productivity Anomalies from Survey Data — create_productivity_anomaly
text: Processes survey species data calculate recruitment-spawner ratios (r/s) anomalies (z-scores) across species EPUs. Outputs data formatted State Ecosystem (SOE) reporting.

code: create_productivity_anomaly(   input_survey_bio,   input_survey_bio_epu,   input_static_lw_table,   inputPathSpecies,   input_static_length_convert,   species2include = c("SPINY DOGFISH", "BARNDOOR SKATE", "WINTER SKATE",     "CLEARNOSE SKATE", "ROSETTE SKATE", "LITTLE SKATE", "SMOOTH SKATE", "THORNY SKATE",     "OFFSHORE HAKE", "SILVER HAKE", "ATLANTIC COD", "HADDOCK", "POLLOCK", "WHITE HAKE",     "RED HAKE", "ATLANTIC HALIBUT", "AMERICAN PLAICE", "SUMMER FLOUNDER",     "YELLOWTAIL FLOUNDER", "WINTER FLOUNDER", "WITCH FLOUNDER", "WINDOWPANE",     "BUTTERFISH", "BLUEFISH", "BLACK SEA BASS", "SCUP", "TILEFISH", "ACADIAN REDFISH",     "ATLANTIC WOLFFISH", "OCEAN POUT", "GOOSEFISH", "BLUELINE TILEFISH",           "ATLANTIC SALMON") )

Full path survey data bio rds file input_survey_bio_epu File path survey data bio data epu (.rds format) input_static_lw_table File path length weight table Miller 2013 (.rda format) inputPathSpecies File path species lookup table (.rds format) input_static_length_convert File path length conversion table (.rda format) species2include Character vector species include (default: commonly surveyed species)

title: Indicator Dependencies
text: run “workflow” , assumed “raw” survey data pulled using get_survey_data function . Note: following function resides folder data-raw part package inputPathBigelow path data set EDAB_Datasets/bigelowData.rds. inputPathAlbatross path created survey data EDAB_Datasets/albatrossData.rds. outputPath path folder indicator data saved, EDAB_Indicators. rds file name hardcoded survey_shannon.rds match ecodata package dataset

title: Indicator Dependencies
text: run “workflow” , assumed “raw” survey data pulled using get_survey_data function . Note: following function resides folder data-raw part package inputPathSpecies path static data set EDAB_Datasets/SOE_species_list_24.rds. inputPathSurvey path dynamically created survey data EDAB_Datasets/surveyNoLengths.rds. static_depth path file nes_bath_data.nc static_diagonal path file diag.csv static_coast_coord path file nes_coast_2.csv static_strat_areas path file stratareas.rds rds file name hardcoded species_dist.rds match ecodata package dataset

title: Indicator Dependencies
text: run “workflow” , assumed “raw” survey data pulled using get_survey_data function . Note: following function resides folder data-raw part package input_survey_bio_epu path dynamically created survey data EDAB_Datasets/Workflows/surveyBiologicalByEPUData.rds. input_survey_bio path dynamically created survey data EDAB_Datasets/Workflows/surveyBiologicalData.rds. input_static_lw_table path static length weight table Miller 2013 EDAB_Datasets/Workflows/df_lw.rda. inputPathSpecies path static data set EDAB_Datasets/Workflows/SOE_species_list_24.rds. input_static_length_convert path static length conversion table EDAB_Datasets/Workflows/df_lconv.rda. outputPath path folder indicator data saved, EDAB_Indicators. rds file name hardcoded productivity_anomaly.rds match ecodata package dataset

title: Indicator Dependencies
text: inputPath path static data set EDAB_Dev/beet/condition.rds inputPathSpecies path static data set EDAB_Resources/workflow_resources/soe_workflows/species.codes.csv inputPathLW path static data set EDAB_Resources/workflow_resources/soe_workflows/LWparams.csv outputPath path folder indicator data saved, EDAB_Indicators. rds file name hardcoded condition.rds match ecodata package dataset

title: Indicator Dependencies
text: commercial data pulled Oracle database via cron job (quarterly?) using R function channel connection object created using ROracle::dbConnect() outputPathDatasets path folder “raw” data stored (EDAB_Datasets) commercial_comdat.rds - used comdat commercial_bennet.rds - used bennet

title: Indicator Dependencies
text: run “workflow” , assumed commercial data pulled using get_commercial_data function . Note: following function resides folder data-raw part package inputPathSpecies path static data set EDAB_Datasets/SOE_species_list_24.rds. inputPathBennet path dynamically created commercial data EDAB_Datasets/commercial_benent.rds. outputPath path folder indicator data saved, EDAB_Indicators. rds file name hardcoded bennet.rds match ecodata package dataset

title: Indicator Dependencies
text: run “workflow” , assumed commercial data pulled using get_commercial_data function menhaden data pulled using create_menhaden_input.R script folder data-raw. Note: following function resides folder data-raw part package comdat_path path raw, comprehensive commercial landings data file, e.g., EDAB_Datasets/commercial_comdat.rds. input_path_species path species list used grouping, e.g., EDAB_Datasets/SOE_species_list_24.rds. menhaden_path path Menhaden landings data output create_create_menhaden_input.R. outputPathDataSets path folder indicator data saved, EDAB_Indicators. rds file name hardcoded comdat.rds match ecodata package dataset

title: Indicator Dependencies
text: run “workflow” , assumed stocksmart R package updated include recent assessment data. Note: following function resides folder data-raw part package inputPath path static data set EDAB_Datasets/decoder.csv. outputPath path folder indicator data saved, EDAB_Indicators. rds file name hardcoded stock_status.rds match ecodata package dataset

title: Indicator Dependencies
text: run “workflow” , assumed static input file Kevin Friedland present. Note: following function resides folder data-raw part package inputPath path static data set EDAB_Datasets/TS_SHP_adv rep MAB GOM GBK NES SCSPoly.csv. outputPath path folder indicator data saved, EDAB_Indicators. rds file name hardcoded trans_dates.rds match ecodata package dataset

title: Indicator Dependencies
text: run “workflow” , assumed static, detrended input files Joe Caracappa Vince Saba present. Note: following function resides folder data-raw part package inputPathGBxxx path static, detrended data sets EDAB_Datasets/GB_SST_1982_to_2024_detrended.csv EDAB_Datasets/daily_bottomT_GB_1959_2024_detrended.csvfor Georges Bank surface bottom heatwaves, respectively. inputPathGOMxxx path static, detrended data sets EDAB_Datasets/GOM_SST_1982_to_2024_detrended.csv EDAB_Datasets/daily_bottomT_GOM_1959_2024_detrended.csvfor Gulf Maine surface bottom heatwaves, respectively. inputPathMABxxx path static, detrended data sets EDAB_Datasets/MAB_SST_1982_to_2024_detrended.csv EDAB_Datasets/daily_bottomT_MAB_1959_2024_detrended.csvfor Mid-Atlantic Bight surface bottom heatwaves, respectively. outputPath path folder indicator data saved, EDAB_Indicators. rds file names hardcoded heatwave.rds, heatwave_year.rds match ecodata package dataset

title: Indicator Dependencies
text: Recreational data pulled using function . Note: following function resides folder data-raw part package outputDir path folder “raw” data stored, currently EDAB_Dev/atyrell data set created hms_mrip_(Sys.Date).csv run “workflow” , assumed recreational data pulled using workflow_pull_rec_hms function . Note: following function resides folder data-raw part package inputPath path data set created workflow_pull_rec_hms, currently residing EDAB_Dev/atyrell/hms_mrip_(Sys.Date).csv. inputKey path static data set EDAB_Resources/workflow_resources/soe_workflows/hms_key.csv outputPath path folder indicator data saved, EDAB_Indicators. rds file name hardcoded rec_hms.rds match ecodata package dataset

title: SOEworkflows 0.1.0
text: Added workflows following indicators used State Ecosystem report 2025: aggregate_biomass bennet comdat condition exp_n heatwave heatwave_year productivity_anomaly rec_hms speies_dist stock_status survey_shannon trans_dates
